case_title: ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION VS MARQUEZ CLARENCE AKA CLARENCE JOHN MARQUEZ JR.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-15-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF SEP-27-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.18 FILED BY ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ CLARENCE AKA CLARENCE JOHN MARQUEZ JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ CLARENCE AKA CLARENCE JOHN MARQUEZ JR. $229.98 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $297.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ CLARENCE AKA CLARENCE JOHN MARQUEZ JR.
